meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Solve Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with impossible bugs. Learn a high-speed freelancer workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to debug complex SaaS projects efficiently.
content.answer_block: To solve intractable debugging, implement a structured observability-first workflow. Use Antigravity to isolate state mutations and Claude Code to perform automated root-cause analysis on stack traces. By decoupling logic from side effects, you reduce debugging time by 70%, allowing you to ship features faster and maintain client trust.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking. Your client’s production environment is throwing cryptic errors, and your local environment is a black box of unhelpful stack traces. You’ve spent hours chasing ghosts in the codebase, and the 'it works on my machine' excuse is no longer an option. The pressure is mounting, and your reputation is on the line.

But elite freelancers don't debug by guessing. They use a systematic, tool-assisted workflow that transforms chaos into clear, actionable data. By integrating AI-driven analysis directly into your CLI, you can pierce through the noise and identify the exact line causing the failure. It’s time to move from frantic troubleshooting to surgical precision.

steps.title: Contextualize the Failure
steps.description: Before running commands, capture the exact state of the failure. Feed the relevant file structure and recent logs into the AI to prime the context window.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the provided stack trace and local file structure. Identify the top 3 potential points of failure within the data flow.

steps.title: Isolate State Mutations
steps.description: Use Antigravity to map out how data moves through your functions. This prevents 'state pollution' where one bug cascades into three others.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Map the state mutations in this module. Highlight any variables that are being modified outside of controlled setter functions.

steps.title: Automated Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Leverage Claude Code to simulate the execution flow. This bypasses manual tracing and points you directly to the logic error.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Based on the error trace, perform a dry-run analysis. Find the logical inconsistency that causes the undefined reference.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Trace the execution path for this error and identify the missing null check.'

steps.title: Execute Surgical Refactoring
steps.description: Apply the fix using a targeted patch. Never refactor the entire file when a single conditional check will suffice.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a minimal, defensive patch to handle the identified null case. Ensure it follows existing project coding standards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply 'Add null coalescing operator to line 42'

steps.title: Verify with Regression Tests
steps.description: Ensure your fix didn't break existing features. Use AI to generate a quick sanity-check test suite.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Jest test case that specifically reproduces the bug and verifies the fix remains stable.

pro_tips: Always use --dry-run with Claude Code before applying changes to production-critical files.
Maintain a 'bug-log' file in your repo; feed this into your AI context window for every new session to prevent recurring issues.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation comments for your fixes immediately; this adds perceived value to your client deliverables.
If a bug persists, ask the AI to 'explain this code like I am a senior developer' to uncover hidden architectural assumptions.
Automate your debugging setup by saving your most effective Antigravity prompts in a local `.ai-prompts` folder.
resources: Clean Code Principles for AI: https://clean-code-ai.guide
content.next_steps: Once the bug is squashed, document the resolution in your project's README. Then, schedule a 5-minute sync with the client to show them the improved stability of the module.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting billable hours on manual debugging. Master these tools and reclaim your time, your sanity, and your client's respect. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
